_meta.description: Policy for handling internal contradictions and mutually-exclusive source signals.

contradictionChecks.trigger: Two supported source statements disagree on a core numeric value.
examples: Doc A says 120,000 and doc B says 118,000 for same metric/period.
Opening balance differs by 2k across statement pages.

contradictionChecks.trigger: One fact indicates debit positive while another indicates credit for same row.
examples: Row labeled Expense appears positive in one pass and negative in another.

contradictionChecks.trigger: Parties differ between headings and body for same metric.
examples: Header says Subsidiary A, body values belong to Subsidiary B.
Party name drift inside same section.

templates.text: Use machine-actionable policy fallback when a contradiction policy rule is missing.
